title: 5 Laggards For The Week Ending July 15, 2022
text: Following a nearly 2% increase in the S&P 500 in the previous week, the major indexes tumbled lower in the week ending July 15, 2022. The release of the monthly inflation report showing inflation at a four-decade high and a disappointing earnings release from JPM on Thursday contributed to the sour trading mood.

title: Equity REITs: Takeaways From NAREIT REIT Week
text: After meeting with over 25 companies in New York for the first in-person NAREIT sponsored conference since November 2019, we came away extremely positive on the fundamentals for REITs. Across the board, leasing, occupancy, and rent growth are tracking at or above expectations, and the recent increase in interest rates has already slowed new construction, further tilting the supply.
